subject: Our choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
It's time for Democrats everywhere to honor President Obama's legacy and keep yesterday's incredible energy going. That's why I'm asking for your help... [****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170122-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
Friend -- On Friday, we watched in shock as President Trump attacked the Obama Administration's legacy, sowed division, and painted a bleak picture of the country he now leads.

But yesterday, it was our turn to speak out -- and did we ever! From the National Mall to the West Coast, Americans stood up, took to the streets, and showed the world what we really stand for: Equality, opportunity, progress, and protection for the most vulnerable.

Now we have a choice to make. Will we call it a day and sit back down? Or will we answer President Obama's call with a lasting grassroots response?

[**I 've made my choice, Friend. I'm all-in to help the DSCC hit its $150,000 goal and keep yesterday's incredible energy going. Will you pitch in and help before tonight's deadline?**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170122-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

The new administration hasn't hidden its plans to undo years of hard-fought progress -- and already, we've seen sweeping executive orders targeting the Affordable Care Act and raising mortgage fees.

**They aren 't wasting any time, and neither can we.**

**That 's why this goal is so urgent, Friend -- and why I'm counting on you to help meet it. Please pitch in and join Democrats everywhere in resisting the Trump agenda:**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170122-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

Thanks for all you do,

name: Democrats.org
subject: I voted. And marched. And I'm just getting started.
body:
Let's get to work.
---
**Pitch in today to help Democrats fight back against the Trump administration and Republicans in Congress.

** **[PITCH IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a49e/3868467833/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+PITCH+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd")**
Friend --

On Saturday, I was part of the crowd of almost half a million people who came together for the Women's March in Washington, D.C.

It was incredibly moving and inspirational to see so many people from all walks of life standing united, and there to fight for one another. And one of the best parts was, because the crowd was so huge, I didn't have cell service to see what, if anything, our new president had tweeted about it.

It might have been the optimism of the day that led me to think maybe he had learned to show some restraint -- or was so overwhelmed by the size of the protest that he didn't know how to respond! But then yesterday morning, he finally weighed in:

[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a49f/3868467833/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd")
We know that this new administration deals in what they now call "alternative facts" (aka lies) -- and one of their favorites is that Trump won by a landslide. But we know that he lost the popular vote by around 2.9 million votes. And guess how many people showed up to march all across the country on Saturday? About 2.9 million people.

I know I voted. And marched. And I plan to do everything I can for the next four years to stand up against Trump and the GOP's radical agenda. Not just when there's an election, but every day. And from what I could see and hear at our march in Washington and marches all across the country, people are ready to step up. To organize in their communities. Call their representatives. Get involved in a campaign or maybe even run for office themselves.

Trump and the GOP are underestimating us at their own peril. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can today to be part of helping Democrats build on our momentum and fight back together.

**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a49c/3868467833/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a49d/3868467833/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a49a/3868467833/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a49b/3868467833/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a498/3868467833/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a499/3868467833/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd")
** Thanks for standing with us.

EJ

Digital Strategist
Democratic National Committee

Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a4a7/3868467833/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a4a4/3868467833/VEsHBA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d7/4067b0a/23ced3764/7e78a4a5/3868467833/VEsHBw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ejb_nd&source=em_20170123_ejb_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

Yesterday marked the 44th anniversary of a woman's right-to-choose becoming legal.

But Trump is moving at a breakneck pace to defund Planned Parenthood and find a way to overturn _Roe v. Wade._

That is why this week is crucial to ensure we have the support we need to protect Planned Parenthood and a woman's right to choose against GOP attacks.

body:
Let's get to work.
---
**Pitch in today to help Democrats fight back against the Trump administration and Republicans in Congress.

** **[PITCH IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d3/4067b0a/23ca91e98/7e78ac46/1805333999/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+PITCH+IN&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ew2_nd&source=em_20170123_ew2_nd")**
Friend --

Donald Trump spent the first few days of his presidency focused on the most important issue facing our country:

The size of the crowd at his inauguration.

Fewer people attended Trump's swearing-in than either of President Obama's inaugurations. Far fewer people were in town for Friday's inauguration than for the Women's March on Washington on Saturday. Those are the facts.

Ultimately, inauguration crowd size doesn't really matter. But the way that Trump and his senior aides have reacted does. **[If Trump and his minions are so quick to lie about something as petty as crowd size, how can we trust them to tell the truth about anything?](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c0d3/4067b0a/23ca91e98/7e78ac47/1805333999/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/Help-Democrats-Fight-Back1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+If+Trump+and+his+minions+are+so+quick+to&utm_campaign=em_20170123_ew2_nd&source=em_20170123_ew2_nd")**

When Donald went to CIA headquarters on Saturday and stood in front of the wall of 117 stars honoring fallen CIA officers, he didn't talk about the important work they did or their sacrifice. He didn't offer an apology for comparing the intelligence community to Nazis. He denounced media reports and boasted about his own, inflated sense of the size of his crowds.

In his first official press briefing, new White House Press Secretary Sean Spicer attacked reporters who accurately reported on the low turnout, presented the administration's preferred crowd photos (which obscured all the empty space), and then stormed off without answering any questions.

And when confronted with reality, Trump campaign manager Kellyanne Conway coined the Orwellian phrase "alternative facts" to describe the administration's lies about the inauguration crowds.

This is about far more than Donald Trump's bruised ego. He made the media one of the villains in his campaign, and now, with the full weight of the White House behind him, he is trying to discredit unbiased, objective reporting about his administration and reinvent lies as "alternative facts."

It's the first step to avoiding accountability. So we have to be relentless in calling out every lie and getting out the truth. Can we count on you to help fight back?

name: Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: Looking forward to working with you, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I look forward to joining you in working harder than ever before to elect more Democrats to the Senate as we fight tooth and nail for the issues we believe in. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed90/2b07114c/47001c61/7369845c/2667189985/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-senator-van-hollen?source=PT-20170123-VanHollen-ProsHV")
---
Friend \-- There's nothing quite like getting a phone call from Chuck Schumer the week after your election to the U.S. Senate asking you to chair the DSCC.

As a proud Democrat, I was ready to take that call and jump directly into the critical fight to re-elect 25 Senate Democrats in 2018. I am ready to fight tooth and nail with you for the values we believe in and to ensure that our Caucus remains the all-important last line of defense against a reckless Trump agenda and Republican controlled Congress.

**And I may be a Senator now, but along the way I 've learned that what's more important than any title on your door is what you believe in and what gets you out of bed each day.** For me, it's all about giving every American a fair shake \-- fighting for every hardworking person to be able to achieve the dignity of a decent job, the opportunity to secure a future for their children, and the respect of a government that cares.

[**So Friend, what gets YOU fired-up every day? I want to hear what motivates your activism and engagement in this critical fight. Please share here >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed90/2b07114c/47001c61/7369845c/2667189985/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-senator-van-hollen?source=PT-20170123-VanHollen-ProsHV")

_**Your Action History:**_
**Name** : Friend
**Last Petition Signed** : N/A
**Let us know why you're in: **[**signature needed >>**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed90/2b07114c/47001c61/7369845c/2667189985/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-senator-van-hollen?source=PT-20170123-VanHollen-ProsHV")

I was proud to march with millions of Americans this weekend as they took their first stand in the fight for the heart and soul of America in the Women's Marches across this country \-- and this is only the beginning. We will need you more than ever as we enter the big battles before us.

But first let me thank you. Your willingness to stand up for your values is what will make our party strong \-- and provides the support we need to stop the Trump administration's attempts to turn back the clock.

We are at the start of a critical journey together to preserve the progress we have made as a country these last eight years. It won't be easy, but I know we are up to the task ahead because we are fighting the good fight. We are fighting not to leave anyone behind -- no matter their race, creed, gender, sexual orientation, bank account size, or zip code. And we are fighting for an America that is respected in the world for its values and principles, not just its military might.

[**Friend, we need every Democrat on board for this fight and I want to hear from you. What motivates you to stay involved? Let me know why you 're all in >> **](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed90/2b07114c/47001c61/7369845c/2667189985/VEsC/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-senator-van-hollen?source=PT-20170123-VanHollen-ProsHV")

I also want to take a moment to tell you a little about myself. I've never shied away from a tough fight and I have worked hard since my first election to the Maryland state legislature to advance our founding vision of equal rights, equal justice and equal opportunity. Along the way I've taken on Big Oil, the NRA, the tobacco companies, and the Tea Party; among others.

I was a proud member of the House Democratic leadership team that passed President Obama's key legislative agenda, including Wall Street Reform, the Affordable Care Act, and the Economic Recovery Act; and as Ranking Democrat on the House Budget Committee while Paul Ryan was Chairman, to fight successfully to save Social Security and Medicare and push back against GOP efforts to defund Planned Parenthood.

I look forward to working with you and learning from you \-- getting your ideas, hearing about the issues that motivate you, and knowing what direction you think our party should go.

[**Thanks for taking a moment to share your thoughts.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed90/2b07114c/47001c61/7369845c/2667189985/VEsD/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-senator-van-hollen?source=PT-20170123-VanHollen-ProsHV")

Onwards!
Chris Van Hollen
Chairman, DSCC

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-vanhollen?refcode=DPE-20170123-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed90/2b07114c/47001c61/7369845e/2667189985/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed90/2b07114c/47001c61/73698459/2667189985/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed90/2b07114c/47001c61/73698458/2667189985/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Can't stop. Won't stop.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
What an amazing weekend of action! | Friend,

What an amazing weekend of action! I was so proud to join the millions of Americans on Saturday who participated in the Women's March across this country. This weekend was the first stand in the fight for the heart and soul of America - and it's only the beginning.

We have some tough battles ahead to stop repeal of the Affordable Care Act and protect the Supreme Court and core American values. We must stop the emerging Trump Swamp Cabinet of Wall Street billionaires and right wing ideologues from undermining our public schools and civil rights -- and enacting policies that enrich the few at the expense of the many.

[**That 's why today I'm asking you to stand with me and show President Trump that we are in it for the long term and the Women's March was just the start of a sustained citizen resistance against any efforts to turn back the clock. **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b2c/70cdc2ba/47436c4e/3979292/926116728/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-to-trump-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Thatrsquos+why+today+Irsquom+asking+you+&utm_campaign=em012317&source=em012317") [SIGN MY NAME](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b2c/70cdc2ba/47436c4e/3979293/926116728/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-to-trump-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+SIGN+MY+NAME&utm_campaign=em012317&source=em012317")
It's hard to believe, but we now have a White House that has already shown us they won't be dealing in facts. Since being inaugurated Trump has already authorized his Press Secretary to feed "alternative facts" to the American people. We need a White House focused on the real world, not the world of reality TV; addressing real facts, not generating fake news.

**[Please join me in telling President Trump that we hold our leaders to a higher standard and won't sit back and watch our country slip backwards.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b2c/70cdc2ba/47436c4e/3979290/926116728/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/stand-up-to-trump-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Please+join+me+in+telling+President+Trum&utm_campaign=em012317&source=em012317")**

Thank you for making your voice heard,

Chris
---

body:
| | | Aren't you a proud Democrat?

I'm emailing you because I need every Democrat to step up.

Donald Trump and Republicans in Congress are pledging to undo decades of American progress. They want to:

-Repeal Obamacare
-Defund Planned Parenthood
-Dismantle Social Security and Medicare
-Ban Muslims from entering the US

**As a Democrat, I refuse to sit by and let Republicans get away with it. We need to hold them accountable.**

And today, I need your help to fight against their outrageous agenda.

[**TAKE ACTION: Stand with me against the dangerous policies pushed by Donald Trump and his Republicans.**](http://links.e.dccc.org/ctt?kn=9&ms=Mjc2NDI1MTcS1&r=Mjk4Nzk5MTk4OTQ5S0&b=0&j=OTY0NTUzNTI5S0&mt=2&rj=OTY0NTUzNTI4S0&rt=0)

As a member of our team, we'll keep you updated on the fights ahead for Democrats.

Thanks for standing with us.

Dan

Executive Director, DCCC

Friend -- We had to bump Senator Chuck Schumer's message to the top of your inbox.

Thousands of grassroots Democrats answered his call to action yesterday, **helping us blow past our $150,000 grassroots goal and send a HUUGE message to Donald Trump.**

We're clearly not done fighting yet, Friend.

[**So to capture this momentum, we 're extending our grassroots goal to hit $200,000 by midnight tonight. Can we count on you to pitch in? Every $1 makes a difference!**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/trump-takes-office?refcode=DPE-20170123-DidYouSeeDS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Senator Schumer is absolutely right that we cannot wait to make our voices heard -- not when Trump is teeing up executive order after executive order to install his right-wing agenda.

[**Will you keep the unprecedented response against Trump going, Friend? Please pitch in whatever you can to help us hit our $200,000 grassroots goal by midnight tonight >>**](https://secure.dscc. Team DSCC

From: Chuck Schumer
Date: Sunday, January 22, 2017
Subject: Our choice

Friend -- On Friday, we watched in shock as President Trump attacked the Obama Administration's legacy, sowed division, and painted a bleak picture of the country he now leads.

But yesterday, it was our turn to speak out -- and did we ever! From the National Mall to the West Coast, Americans stood up, took to the streets, and showed the world what we really stand for: Equality, opportunity, progress, and protection for the most vulnerable.

Now we have a choice to make. Will we call it a day and sit back down? Or will we answer President Obama's call with a lasting grassroots response?

[**I 've made my choice, Friend. I'm all-in to help the DSCC hit its $150,000 goal and keep yesterday's incredible energy going. Will you pitch in and help before tonight's deadline?**](https://secure.dscc.
